texto: I love the way you make me feel like I'm a completed person. I love the way I want to take care of you. When I'm with you I feel that I've come home - home in a way everyone imagines home should be.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Juduth Krantz: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. O trecho “I love the way you make me feel like I'm a completed person. I love the way I want to take care o…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, romantic, completed pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.

frase_original: I love the way you make me feel like I'm a completed person. I love the way I want to take care of you. When I'm with you I feel that I've come home - home in a way everyone imagines home should be.
